reflection:
morning. you skipped the checkin yesterday. nothing logged, so the only voice i have from you is the berlin terrace journal two nights back, the one about your move, the stars, your tiredness. that's a notable gap given you're traveling and your body has been loud all week.

here's what your data did say. whoop bumped your recovery from 36 to 65 after that first berlin night. your body actually liked the terrace, the quieter air, the chicken and salad dinner. hrv came back up to 34. that's a real signal. you were braced for the worst and you got something better.

but the seven day shape isn't great. pain has been climbing, 3 to 5. mood drifted from 8 down to 6. monday left an honest dent that you were still tasting on tuesday. and your last worry dump was almost entirely about turkey, you wrote 'very, very hard' twice in two sentences. that's the mind rehearsing exhaustion before it arrives.

one thing for today. fill the checkin. even three lines. you write better when you put the words down, your reframes work, your worry dumps land. when you skip, the loop runs unmonitored in your head and gets louder. five minutes. then a real lunch before 14:00.

go gently.
opener: you skipped yesterday, but your body landed in berlin better than you feared
focus_for_today: fill the checkin, even three lines. then a real lunch before 14:00.
